expectations.text: for_loop_used: A for / end loop drives mass and/or spring-damper creation
expectations.evidence: Two FOR loops: 'for variable_name = i start_value = 1 end_value = 8' for mass creation and 'for variable_name = j start_value = 1 end_value = 7' for spring-damper creation.

expectations.text: eval_function_used: EVAL() used to dereference a variable inside a command string
expectations.evidence: EVAL() used throughout, e.g., 'point_mass_name = (eval(".chain.mass_" // RTOI(i)))' and 'location = (eval((i - 1) * 50.0)), 0.0, 0.0'.

expectations.text: rtoi_function_used: RTOI() used to convert the loop counter to a string for name construction
expectations.evidence: RTOI(i) and RTOI(j) used extensively for name construction, e.g., '".chain.mass_" // RTOI(i)' and '".chain.spr_" // RTOI(j) // "_" // RTOI(j + 1)'.

expectations.text: string_concat_operator_used: // string concatenation operator used to build part/marker names
expectations.evidence: // operator used throughout, e.g., '".chain.mass_" // RTOI(i) // ".cm"' and '".chain.spr_" // RTOI(j) // "_" // RTOI(j + 1)'.

expectations.text: point_mass_type_used: Masses created with part create point_mass (not rigid_body)
expectations.evidence: 'part create point_mass name_and_position' used in the FOR loop for all 8 masses.

expectations.text: spring_damper_created: Spring-dampers created with force create element_like translational_spring_damper with stiffness=100, damping=1.0, displacement_at_preload=50
expectations.evidence: 'force create element_like translational_spring_damper' with stiffness=100.0, damping=1.0, displacement_at_preload=50.0. All three values match the rubric.

expectations.text: first_mass_fixed_to_ground: First mass (mass_1) is constrained to ground with a SPHERICAL joint (NOT a fixed joint)
expectations.evidence: 'constraint create joint spherical joint_name = .chain.fix_1 i_marker_name = .chain.mass_1.cm j_marker_name = .chain.ground.anchor_mkr' — correctly uses spherical, not fixed.
FOR loop uses 'start_value = 1 end_value = 8', creating mass_1 through mass_8.

expectations.text: 50mm_spacing: Masses are spaced 50 mm apart along the X axis
simulate_transient: Script uses simulation single_run transient command
expectations.evidence: 'simulation single_run transient type = auto_select end_time = 2.0 number_of_steps = 200 model_name = .chain initial_static = no'.

expectations.text: dot_path_names: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
expectations.evidence: All names use full dot-path, e.g., .chain.mass_1, .chain.ground.anchor_mkr, .chain.fix_1, .chain.spr_1_2.

expectations.text: no_adams_id: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No 'adams_id' keyword found anywhere in chain.cmd.

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape added to each mass
expectations.evidence: No 'geometry create shape' commands anywhere in chain.cmd. Point masses have no visual geometry defined.

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: Run returned exit code 0. The only 'Error' lines in the log are Python excepthook/SyntaxError from VS Code's Python RC file initialization (after 'End of chain.cmd'), unrelated to the script. Model completed with 'batch run is finished'.
